name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy plugin for Claude Code — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, in-app bug reports. One install, one MCP registration, all features nested under /shipeasy:<area>:<verb>.

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: End-to-end Shipeasy plugin: base SDK install + auth + bind, plus experiments, metrics, gates, configs, kill switches, translations, and feedback. Slash commands live at /shipeasy:setup, /shipeasy:experiments:{install,create,list,start,status,update,stop,archive,delete}, /shipeasy:metrics:{install,create,list,show,delete,grammar}, /shipeasy:flags:{install,create,list,update,delete}, /shipeasy:configs:{install,create,list,update,delete}, /shipeasy:ks:{install,create,list,update,delete}, /shipeasy:i18n:{install,extract,migrate}, /shipeasy:bugs:{install,report,list,fix}, /shipeasy:feats:implement. Registers the shipeasy MCP server. Replaces the deprecated base/experiments-metrics/configs-gates/polylang/bugs plugins.
